collection_description: Presentation dashboards for the AWS DataOps Redshift warehouse.

dashboards.name: Nash DataOps - Executive Overview
dashboards.description: High-level operating view of FHVHV trip volume, coverage, and demand patterns.

cards.text: Read this row left to right: loaded warehouse volume, average trip duration after quality filtering, and pickup/dropoff location completeness from the public source data.

cards.name: Total trips loaded
cards.description: Fact rows currently loaded into Redshift.

cards.name: Average trip duration
cards.description: Mean trip duration in minutes after Silver quality filters.

cards.name: Pickup location coverage
cards.description: Percentage of fact rows with a pickup location ID.
cards.query:
select round(100.0 * count(pu_location_id)::decimal(18, 2) / nullif(count(*), 0), 2) as pickup_location_pct
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips;

cards.name: Dropoff location coverage
cards.description: Percentage of fact rows with a dropoff location ID.
cards.query:
select round(100.0 * count(do_location_id)::decimal(18, 2) / nullif(count(*), 0), 2) as dropoff_location_pct
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips;

cards.name: Daily trip volume
cards.query:
select
  d.full_date as pickup_date,
  count(*)::bigint as trips
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips f
join {{schema}}.dim_date d
  on f.pickup_date_key = d.date_key
group by 1
order by 1;

cards.name: Trips by pickup borough
cards.description: Pickup geography mix; Unknown represents sparse public source location IDs.
cards.query:
select
  coalesce(z.borough, 'Unknown') as pickup_borough,
  count(*)::bigint as trips
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips f
left join {{schema}}.dim_zone z
  on f.pu_location_id = z.location_id
group by 1
order by trips desc;

cards.name: Trips by pickup hour
cards.description: Hourly demand profile across loaded months.
cards.query:
select
  pickup_hour,
  count(*)::bigint as trips
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips
group by 1
order by 1;

cards.name: Warehouse table counts
cards.description: Simple proof that the star schema was populated.
cards.query:
select 'fact_fhvhv_trips' as table_name, count(*)::bigint as row_count from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips
union all
select 'dim_date' as table_name, count(*)::bigint as row_count from {{schema}}.dim_date
union all
select 'dim_zone' as table_name, count(*)::bigint as row_count from {{schema}}.dim_zone
order by table_name;

dashboards.name: Nash DataOps - Zone & Route Analysis
dashboards.description: Operational view of pickup/dropoff zones, borough flows, and busiest routes.

cards.text: Use these charts to compare known pickup/dropoff zones. This public dataset has sparse pickup locations, so known-zone charts intentionally exclude null pickup IDs.

cards.name: Top pickup zones
cards.query:
select
  coalesce(z.borough, 'Unknown') || ' - ' || coalesce(z.zone, 'Unknown') as pickup_zone,
  count(*)::bigint as trips
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips f
left join {{schema}}.dim_zone z
  on f.pu_location_id = z.location_id
where f.pu_location_id is not null
group by 1
order by trips desc
limit 15;

cards.name: Top dropoff zones
cards.query:
select
  coalesce(z.borough, 'Unknown') || ' - ' || coalesce(z.zone, 'Unknown') as dropoff_zone,
  count(*)::bigint as trips
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips f
left join {{schema}}.dim_zone z
  on f.do_location_id = z.location_id
where f.do_location_id is not null
group by 1
order by trips desc
limit 15;

cards.name: Borough-to-borough flows
cards.description: Trip flow between pickup and dropoff boroughs.
cards.query:
select
  coalesce(pu.borough, 'Unknown') as pickup_borough,
  coalesce(dz.borough, 'Unknown') as dropoff_borough,
  count(*)::bigint as trips,
  round(avg(f.trip_duration_minutes), 2) as avg_minutes
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips f
left join {{schema}}.dim_zone pu
  on f.pu_location_id = pu.location_id
left join {{schema}}.dim_zone dz
  on f.do_location_id = dz.location_id
group by 1, 2
order by trips desc
limit 25;

cards.name: Top pickup-to-dropoff routes
cards.description: Most frequent known zone pairs with average duration.
cards.query:
select
  coalesce(pu.zone, 'Unknown') as pickup_zone,
  coalesce(dz.zone, 'Unknown') as dropoff_zone,
  count(*)::bigint as trips,
  round(avg(f.trip_duration_minutes), 2) as avg_minutes
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips f
left join {{schema}}.dim_zone pu
  on f.pu_location_id = pu.location_id
left join {{schema}}.dim_zone dz
  on f.do_location_id = dz.location_id
where f.pu_location_id is not null
  and f.do_location_id is not null
group by 1, 2
order by trips desc
limit 25;

cards.name: Longest common routes
cards.description: High-volume routes sorted by average duration.
cards.query:
select
  coalesce(pu.zone, 'Unknown') as pickup_zone,
  coalesce(dz.zone, 'Unknown') as dropoff_zone,
  count(*)::bigint as trips,
  round(avg(f.trip_duration_minutes), 2) as avg_minutes
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips f
left join {{schema}}.dim_zone pu
  on f.pu_location_id = pu.location_id
left join {{schema}}.dim_zone dz
  on f.do_location_id = dz.location_id
where f.pu_location_id is not null
  and f.do_location_id is not null
group by 1, 2
having count(*) >= 100
order by avg_minutes desc
limit 25;

cards.name: Trips by pickup service zone
cards.description: Trips grouped by TLC service-zone label.
cards.query:
select
  coalesce(z.service_zone, 'Unknown') as pickup_service_zone,
  count(*)::bigint as trips
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips f
left join {{schema}}.dim_zone z
  on f.pu_location_id = z.location_id
group by 1
order by trips desc;

dashboards.name: Nash DataOps - Pipeline Proof
dashboards.description: Demo-friendly validation that Bronze/Silver/Gold processing produced queryable warehouse data.

cards.text: This dashboard is for explaining pipeline credibility: the loaded window, lineage fields, quality filter impact, and completeness profile.

cards.name: Loaded date range
cards.description: Date range and distinct days represented in the fact table.
cards.query:
select
  min(pickup_date) as first_pickup_date,
  max(pickup_date) as last_pickup_date,
  count(distinct pickup_date)::bigint as loaded_days
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips;

cards.name: Loaded run IDs
cards.description: Fact rows by pipeline run ID captured during the Glue load.
cards.query:
select
  coalesce(source_run_id, 'Unknown') as source_run_id,
  count(*)::bigint as trips
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips
group by 1
order by trips desc;

cards.name: Loaded source files
cards.description: Source-file lineage retained on warehouse facts.
cards.query:
select
  source_file,
  count(*)::bigint as trips
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips
group by 1
order by trips desc
limit 20;

cards.name: Duration quality band
cards.description: Min/max duration proves the Silver quality rule excluded invalid long trips.
cards.query:
select
  round(min(trip_duration_minutes), 2) as min_minutes,
  round(avg(trip_duration_minutes), 2) as avg_minutes,
  round(max(trip_duration_minutes), 2) as max_minutes
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips;

cards.name: Location completeness profile
cards.description: Completeness values aligned with the Glue Data Quality rule thresholds.
cards.query:
select 'pickup_location_id' as field_name,
       count(pu_location_id)::bigint as non_null_rows,
       count(*)::bigint as total_rows,
       round(100.0 * count(pu_location_id)::decimal(18, 2) / nullif(count(*), 0), 2) as completeness_pct
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips
union all
select 'dropoff_location_id' as field_name,
       count(do_location_id)::bigint as non_null_rows,
       count(*)::bigint as total_rows,
       round(100.0 * count(do_location_id)::decimal(18, 2) / nullif(count(*), 0), 2) as completeness_pct
from {{schema}}.fact_fhvhv_trips
order by field_name;
